headline: Discover which S&P500 stocks are making waves on Tuesday.
summary: Join us in exploring the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Tuesday as we examine the latest happenings in today's session.

headline: AvalonBay's Q1 FFO Tops Estimates, Occupancy Stays High
summary: AvalonBay Communities' Q1 core FFO beats estimates as occupancy stays at 96.1%, but higher interest costs weigh amid active sales and development.

headline: 4 'Safer' Dividend Buys Out Of Barron's 23 April Better Bets Than T-Bills
summary: Long-term bond yields persist under pressure. But investors looking for income can still find plenty of attractive opportunities with dividend-paying stocks that have healthy yields.
